prompt: Create a vertical candid street-style fashion photograph of a smiling young woman posing in bright midday sunlight in front of a brick wall covered with oversized white-and-blue graffiti lettering. She has short dark pixie-cut hair, wears reflective narrow sunglasses, a fitted white cropped tank top, very loose white wide-leg pants, white sneakers, and a white long-sleeve shirt tied around her waist. She carries a large vivid green duffel bag slung over one shoulder, with one arm extended playfully toward the camera as if reaching out, body leaning slightly to the side in a joyful dynamic pose. The setting is an urban parking lot or alley with two visible cars framing her: one partial silver car nose at the left edge and one black classic muscle car at the right with a shiny exposed supercharger on the hood. Use realistic smartphone street photography, natural hard shadows, high contrast, vibrant summer color, slight wide-angle perspective, full-body composition, casual editorial fashion energy, no text overlay or watermark.
